reference: Hello, I am forty-two years old but my shape and beauty make me look like I am only twenty years old. I have two children and I would like to conceive again. My menstrual cycle is regular, but my hormones show a high level of follicle-stimulating hormone at thirty-four and luteinizing hormone at fourteen. Currently, there is a trial to use Fostimon injection, six per day since the 4th day of my cycle. Could it work? Tomorrow is the 12th day of my cycle, please help me.
text: Hello. I am 42 years old, but my shape and beauty make me look like I am only 20 years old. I have two children, and I would like to conceive again. My menstrual cycle is regular, but my hormones show a high level of follicle-stimulating hormone at 34 and luteinizing hormone at 14. Currently, there is a trial to use Fosamon injection, six per day since the fourth day of my cycle. Could it work? Tomorrow is the twelfth day of my cycle. Please help me. Thank you for watching.
